summary: Comprehensive testing of Jessi AI Chat Widget for i'M On Social marketing website. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The chat widget correctly: starts sessions, sends/receives AI messages, auto-extracts contact info (name/email/phone), captures leads, and persists closed state via sessionStorage.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat widget code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend uses in-memory session store (_sessions dict) - sessions reset on server restart, which is acceptable for chat
Auto-extraction regex patterns work correctly for email, phone, and name patterns
Lead capture requires name + (email OR phone) before creating Contact/Conversation/Message in MongoDB
sessionStorage flag 'imos_chat_closed' correctly prevents widget from reappearing after close
AI responses use Emergent LLM Key (real integration, not mocked)
test_credentials: No auth required for chat widget APIs (public endpoints)
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing with unique emails like test_lead_{timestamp}@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat widget feature is fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_chat_widget.py cover all API endpoints. Frontend widget is injected via /marketing/build/chat-widget.js into marketing HTML pages.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/chat/start: PASS - Creates session with session_id and greeting
backend_api_tests.POST /api/chat/message: PASS - Sends visitor message, receives AI response
backend_api_tests.POST /api/chat/capture: PASS - Manually captures lead contact info
backend_api_tests.auto_extract_name: PASS - Extracts name from 'I'm John Smith' pattern
backend_api_tests.auto_extract_email: PASS - Extracts email from message text
backend_api_tests.lead_capture_trigger: PASS - Captures lead when name + email/phone provided
backend_api_tests.invalid_session_handling: PASS - Returns error for invalid session_id
backend_api_tests.empty_message_handling: PASS - Returns error for empty message
backend_api_tests.full_chat_flow: PASS - Complete flow: start -> messages -> capture

frontend_ui_tests.chat_bubble_visible: PASS - Blue bubble with green pulse in bottom-right corner
frontend_ui_tests.bubble_click_opens_panel: PASS - Panel opens with Jessi greeting
frontend_ui_tests.message_input_works: PASS - Can type and send messages
frontend_ui_tests.close_button_works: PASS - X button closes panel and hides bubble
frontend_ui_tests.widget_not_reappear_on_reload: PASS - Widget stays hidden after page reload when closed

mocked_apis.note: Uses real Emergent LLM Key for AI responses
